zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Moleyns Lord Moleyns於1330年2月14日出生在英國巴金哈姆爾斯托克 波格斯時，他的父親Sir John Moleyns26歲，母親Gille Egidia de Mauduit22歲。他於1352年3月12日與Margery Bacon在英國諾福爾可巴根斯索普結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1380年2月14日在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾斯托克 波格斯享年50歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾斯托克 波格斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Moleyns Lord Moleyns was born on 14 February 1330, in Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Sir John Moleyns, was 26 and his mother, Gille Egidia de Mauduit, was 22. He married Margery Bacon on 12 March 1352, in Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 14 February 1380, in Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50, and was buried in Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Moleyns Lord Moleyns est né le 14 février 1330, à Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Moleyns, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Gille Egidia de Mauduit, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margery Bacon le 12 mars 1352, à Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 14 février 1380, à Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Moleyns Lord Moleyns am 14. Februar 1330 in Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Moleyns 26 und seine Mutter Gille Egidia de Mauduit 22. Er hat am 12. März 1352 in Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, England Margery Bacon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 14. Februar 1380 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Margery Bacon il 12 marzo 1352, nel Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 14 febbraio 1380, nel Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Moleyns Lord Moleynsが1330年2月14日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアストク ポジェズで生まれた時，父Sir John Moleynsは26歳，母Gille Egidia de Mauduitは22歳であった。1352年3月12日にイギリスノーフォルクバコンスソルペでMargery Baconと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1380年2月14日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアストク ポジェズで50歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアストク ポジェズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Moleyns Lord Moleyns(이)가 1330년 2월 14일 영국 벅잉함실르 스토크 포그스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Moleyns(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Gille Egidia de Mauduit(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1352년 3월 12일 영국 노르폴크 바콘스소에서 Margery Bacon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1380년 2월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 스토크 포그스에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 스토크 포그스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Moleyns Lord Moleyns nasceu em 14 de fevereiro de 1330, em Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Moleyns, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Gille Egidia de Mauduit, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Bacon em 12 de março de 1352, em Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de fevereiro de 1380, em Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Moleyns Lord Moleyns родился 14 февраля 1330 г. в местности сток погесь, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Moleyns было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Gille Egidia de Mauduit, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Bacon 12 марта 1352 г. в местности бакунстаурп, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 14 февраля 1380 г. в местности сток погесь, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности сток погесь, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.
